name: find-twitter-influencers
description: Discover, score, and enrich Twitter/X influencers for a company or niche. Resolves the brand (Brand.dev), discovers curated listicles (Exa) and LinkedIn-heavy professionals (Fiber), pulls Twitter profiles and engagement (Scrape Creators), and enriches contacts (Fiber kitchen-sink, Hunter, Tomba). Every step is MPP-routed via the SELAT Router.

company.description: Company or brand name to find influencers for (used for Brand.dev retrieve-by-name).

domain.description: Company domain (e.g. acme.com). When provided, Brand.dev retrieve-by-domain is used for richer context.

query.default: best fintech Twitter accounts to follow
query.description: Exa search query for curated influencer listicles in the target niche.

similarUrl.description: A strong listicle URL to expand from via Exa findSimilar.

nlQuery.default: fintech thought leader content creator with Twitter presence
nlQuery.description: Natural-language query for Fiber profile search (catches LinkedIn-heavy professionals).

handle.description: Twitter/X handle (no @) to fetch a profile and recent tweets for.

linkedinUrl.description: LinkedIn profile URL for Fiber kitchen-sink and Tomba contact enrichment.

steps.label: resolve company by name — Brand.dev (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
resolve company by domain — Brand.dev (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
discover curated influencer listicles — Exa search (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
expand from a strong listicle — Exa findSimilar (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
fetch Twitter profile + counts — Scrape Creators (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
fetch top tweets + engagement — Scrape Creators (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
find email by name + domain — Hunter email-finder (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
LinkedIn-to-email — Tomba (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
